name: Detonating Gears Snare
description:
This snare uses clockwork stressed almost to the breaking point, which activates with a powerful explosion that deals ] damage to the first creature entering the snare's square. The creature must attempt a saving throw.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and ] damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and ] damage.
